questions.question: What's the first step when writing a professional email with AI?
options: Just tell ChatGPT to write an email
Provide the key points, recipient context, desired tone, and any constraints
Copy a random email template
Ask ChatGPT to guess what you want
questions.explanation: Giving ChatGPT specific context — who the recipient is, what the key message is, and the desired tone — produces far more useful drafts than vague instructions.

questions.question: How should you handle a customer complaint using AI?
options: Ignore the complaint
Use AI to draft an empathetic response that acknowledges the issue and offers a solution, then personalize it
Have AI send the response directly
Blame the customer in the response
questions.explanation: AI can draft a solid empathetic response framework, but you should always personalize it with specific details about the customer's situation before sending.

questions.question: What's the best way to use AI for meeting follow-ups?
options: AI attends meetings for you
Provide bullet-point notes and ask AI to structure them into a professional summary with action items
Skip follow-ups entirely
Only for external meetings
questions.explanation: AI excels at transforming messy meeting notes into structured summaries with clear action items, owners, and deadlines — saving teams significant time on post-meeting communication.

questions.question: When writing a proposal with AI, what should you provide?
options: Nothing — let AI figure it out
The problem you're solving, your solution approach, target audience, pricing, and any unique selling points
Only the title
A random paragraph
questions.explanation: The more business context you give AI — the problem, your solution, competitive advantages, and pricing — the more compelling and accurate the proposal draft will be.

questions.question: How can AI improve your Slack or Teams messages?
options: AI monitors all your messages automatically
Help you draft clear, concise messages for complex topics that might be misunderstood in text
Replace all team communication
Only for formal announcements
questions.explanation: Text-based communication is prone to misunderstanding. AI can help you rephrase ambiguous messages clearly, strike the right tone, and ensure your intent is communicated effectively.

questions.question: What makes an AI-drafted business communication effective?
options: Using as many buzzwords as possible
Clear structure, appropriate tone for the audience, specific action items, and personalization
Making it as long as possible
Avoiding any specific details
questions.explanation: Effective business communication balances professionalism with clarity. The best AI-drafted messages have a logical structure, match the audience's expectations, and include clear next steps.

questions.question: How should you use AI for negotiation emails?
options: Have AI negotiate for you completely
Draft multiple versions with different approaches (collaborative, firm, creative) and choose the best fit
Never use AI for negotiations
Only for salary negotiations
questions.explanation: Generating multiple draft versions with different tones and strategies gives you options to pick the approach that best fits your negotiation context and relationship.

questions.question: What's a common mistake when using AI for professional writing?
options: Being too specific about requirements
Sending AI output without reviewing and personalizing it — missing context only you would know
Asking for too many revisions
Using AI at all
questions.explanation: AI doesn't know your company culture, relationships, or specific context. Always review, add personal details, and adjust tone before sending any AI-drafted professional communication.

questions.question: How can AI help you write a performance review for a team member?
options: AI can evaluate employees automatically
Provide specific achievements, areas for growth, and examples — AI structures them into a professional review format
Skip performance reviews
Only for HR departments
questions.explanation: AI helps organize your observations into a structured, constructive review. You provide the substance (achievements, growth areas, examples); AI helps with the professional framing and language.

questions.question: What's the best practice when using AI for important business communications?
options: Trust AI completely and hit send immediately
Use AI as a drafting tool, then apply your expertise, verify accuracy, and personalize before sending
Never use AI for important messages
Only use AI for internal emails
questions.explanation: For important communications, AI is best used as a drafting assistant. Your review adds the human judgment, context awareness, and relationship knowledge that make the final message truly effective.
